strategy: Purge the weaknesses first. It stacks protected -100% damage weaknesses on each wizard (one per wizard present), which zero out your hits until you cast the Purge it hands you.
Attack with Myth, Life, or Death (it takes +30% each); never Balance (63% resist) and expect 33% resist on the other schools.
Purge off the weaknesses, then blade and hit as normal.
At 16,820 Health with no minions and one simple cheat, this is soloable once the weaknesses are cleared.
cheatNotes: It puts protected -100% damage weaknesses on each wizard, as many as there are wizards, and hands each of you a Purge to remove them. Your hits do nothing until you Purge them off.
You are not required to cast the Purge to win, but you must clear the weaknesses to deal damage.
